name: Muhammad Rashid
bio: Passionate about crafting responsive, visually appealing web applications with clean code and modern UI/UX principles.

about.description: I'm Muhammad Rashid, a BSIT student at Sindh Agriculture University, Tando Jam, with over a year of hands-on frontend development experience. I thrive on building clean, performant, and accessible web interfaces that users genuinely enjoy.
about.descriptionExtended: My interest spans modern CSS techniques, JavaScript interactivity, responsive layout systems, and UI/UX design thinking. Every project I take on is an opportunity to push the craft forward.
about.education: BSIT - Sindh Agriculture University Tando Jam Sindh Pakistan
